case_title: CAROL ELIZABETH BEESON ET AL VS. RAYMOND BERRIOS

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION THAT COMMISSIONER MAY ACT AS JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BEESON, CAROL ELIZABETH EVANS, CORY BERRIOS, RAYMOND

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-26-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-22-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS CAROL ELIZABETH BEESON & CORY EVANS, AND DEFENDANT RAYMOND BERRIOS. PLAINTIFFS SIGNED STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE BUT DEFENDANT WOULD NOT SIGN SAID STIPULATION, AND REFUSED TO HAVE THIS MATTER HEARD BEFORE A PRO TEM JUDGE. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS CAROL ELIZABETH BEESON AND CORY EVANS. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT RAYMOND BERRIOS. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,750.00 FILED BY BEESON, CAROL ELIZABETH EVANS, CORY AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIOS, RAYMOND ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BEESON, CAROL ELIZABETH EVANS, CORY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERRIOS, RAYMOND $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,790.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIOS, RAYMOND
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED JUN-16-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIOS, RAYMOND
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BEESON, CAROL ELIZABETH EVANS, CORY AS TO DEFENDANT BERRIOS, RAYMOND
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2016 - JUDGMENT.
